case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS WILLIAMS PAMELA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,285.83 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS PAMELA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-1991 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS PAMELA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WILLIAMS PAMELA $1,285.83 PRINCIPAL, $19.79 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,305.62, SETTLEMENT REACHED BY PARTIES STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT WILLIAMS PAMELA
